definitions.text: All of a countable group (considered individually), without exception.
examples: Every person in the room stood and cheered.

definitions.text: Denotes equal spacing at a stated interval, or a proportion corresponding to such a spacing.
examples: We stopped for refreshments every ten miles.
The alarm is going off every few minutes.
We wish you every happiness in the future.
He shows every sign of becoming an excellent player. I have every confidence in him.
